creator: zec@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Konrad from comment #28)

Could you try out the fresh dxr version in stable/13, and let us know how often do range / trie rebuilds happen now with a live feed?  As always, a snippet from a debug log could reveal if there's more that needs to be tweaked, in particular how much of lookup structure fragmentation gets accumulated after N hours of incremental updating...
